basic_details.job_title: NIPER Hajipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Civil Engineer, Internal Auditor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Hajipur (NIPER Hajipur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Hajipur (NIPER Hajipur) Consultants Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website niperhajipur.ac.in/ under Advt. No. NIPER-HJP/Admin./Recruitment/2026-27/01. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the NIPER Hajipur Consultants Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech Civil Engineering, Graduation with knowledge of PFMS, Tally ERP-9, B.E/B.Tech Electrical Engineering, MBBS with MS/DNB/DGO in Obstetrics & Gynaecology, Post-graduate in Clinical Psychology/Psychology with RCI registration
qualification.details: Civil Engineer: B.E/B.Tech or equivalent in Civil Engineering from any recognized institute/University with at least 10 years experience in Housing and Building Construction/Project Management in Civil maintenance/installation activities. Retired Government Officers from engineering wings/Construction wings of Central/State Government/PSUs/Autonomous Bodies preferred. Internal Auditor: Graduation in any discipline with knowledge of PFMS, FR/SR, Tally ERP-9, Administrative Rules and Regulations of Govt of India. Persons retired from Sr. Audit Officer/Sr. Accounts Officer/Audit Officer/Accounts Officer with minimum 10 years service in Indian Audit & Accounts/Indian Revenue/Indian Civil Accounts/Indian Defense Accounts/Indian Railway Accounts/Indian Cost Accounts preferred. Post Graduate in Commerce/Economics/Management or CA/CMA/CFA preferred. Maintenance Engineer (Electrical): B.E/B.Tech or equivalent in Electrical Engineering from any recognized Institute/University. Retired Government Officers from engineering/electrical wings of Central/State Government/PSUs/Autonomous Bodies with at least 10 years experience in maintenance of HVACs/AHU/Chillers/ACs and other electrical engineering aspects. Applicants holding post of Assistant Engineer and above at retirement preferred. Visiting Consultant – Specialist Doctor (Obstetrics & Gynaecology): MBBS Degree or equivalent registered in state/Indian Medical Register and Postgraduate qualification (MS) in Obstetrics & Gynaecology or Equivalent diploma (DNB/DGO). Post-specialization experience of 2 years after completion of post-graduate qualification. Female candidates preferred. Visiting Consultant / Counsellor (Psychology): Post-graduate qualification in Clinical Psychology or Psychology from a recognized university and registered with Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI). At least two years of relevant experience in psychological counselling after completion of qualifying degree (1 year preferably in higher educational institution/hospital setting). Experience of counselling adults 18-40 years, psychometric tests, workshops preferred.

salary_details.details: Civil Engineer: Rs. 50,000/- (Consolidated) Internal Auditor: Rs. 50,000/- (Consolidated) Maintenance Engineer (Electrical): Rs. 50,000/- (Consolidated) Visiting Consultant – Specialist Doctor (Obstetrics & Gynaecology): Rs. 16,000/- per month; 4 Visits (2 hours per visit); Rs. 4,000/- per visit. Additional visits - Rs. 2000/- per hour Visiting Consultant / Counsellor (Psychology): Rs. 12,000/- per month; 4 Visits (3 hours per visit); Rs. 3,000/- per visit. Additional visits - Rs. 1000/- per hour

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIPER Hajipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIPER Hajipur Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NIPER Hajipur Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIPER Hajipur Consultants Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 14th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Consultants posts at NIPER Hajipur?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Consultants positions at NIPER Hajipur in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIPER Hajipur Consultants Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their complete application and required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to NIPER Hajipur Consultants posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all consultant positions is 65 years. There are no specific age relaxations mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant positions at NIPER Hajipur?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 12,000 to Rs. 50,000 per month, depending on the specific consultant post and its responsibilities.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, including B.E/B.Tech in Civil or Electrical Engineering, Graduation with PFMS/Tally knowledge, MBBS with MS/DNB/DGO in Obstetrics & Gynaecology, and Post-graduate in Clinical Psychology/Psychology with RCI registration.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for NIPER Hajipur Consultants Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NIPER Hajipur Consultants Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically includes a Written Test, Interview, and Skill Test, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Hajipur (NIPER Hajipur).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for NIPER Hajipur Consultants Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
